title: Evaluating an Image Classifier - Short Answer

content.problemStatement:
You trained an MLP to classify **Circle** vs **Square** images.  
After testing on 5 images, you obtained the following predictions:

| Image | True Label | Predicted Label |
|-------|------------|----------------|
| 1     | Circle     | Circle         |
| 2     | Circle     | Square         |
| 3     | Square     | Square         |
| 4     | Square     | Circle         |
| 5     | Circle     | Circle         |

**Tasks:**

Calculate the **accuracy** in percentage.
